name: Big Book
description: Search a catalog of millions of books, retrieve detailed book records, find similar titles, and look up authors.

auth.hint: Create a Big Book API account and send the API key in the x-api-key header.

tools.name: search_books
tools.description: Semantically search and filter books by text, publication year, rating, genre, author, ISBN, and other criteria.

params.name: query
params.description: Semantic search query, such as books about wizards.

params.name: isbn
params.description: ISBN-13 of the book to match.

params.name: genres
params.description: Comma-separated genres; books matching any supplied genre are returned.

params.name: authors
params.description: Comma-separated author IDs or names; author IDs are preferred for disambiguation.

params.name: earliest-publish-year
params.description: Only return books published after this year.

params.name: latest-publish-year
params.description: Only return books published before this year.

params.name: min-rating
params.description: Minimum rating in the inclusive range from 0 to 1.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of books to skip, from 0 through 1000.

params.name: number
params.description: Number of books to return, from 1 through 100.

tools.name: get_book
tools.description: Retrieve the complete available record for one book by its Big Book API ID.

params.name: id
params.description: Big Book API numeric book ID.

tools.name: find_similar_books
tools.description: Find books similar to a selected book.

params.name: id
params.description: Big Book API numeric ID of the reference book.

params.name: number
params.description: Number of similar books to return, from 1 through 100.

tools.name: search_authors
tools.description: Search for authors by a full or partial name and return their IDs.

params.name: name
params.description: Full or beginning portion of an author name.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of authors to skip, from 0 through 100.

params.name: number
params.description: Number of authors to return, from 1 through 100.
